headline: CF Industries Holdings (CF) Stock Could Be 19.4% Undervalued After Recent Selloff
summary: CF Industries Holdings (CF) has drawn investor attention after recent price moves, with the stock down about 3% over the past day and roughly 15% over the past month. This has reshaped sentiment around this nitrogen producer. See our latest analysis for CF Industries Holdings. Across timeframes, CF Industries Holdings has seen short term share price pressure, with the 30 day share price return down 15.42%, while the 5 year total shareholder return of 122.91% reflects a much stronger long term...
